# Merchello 

[![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/nuget/dt/Umbraco.Community.Merchello?color=cc9900)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/Umbraco.Community.Merchello/)
[![NuGet](https://img.shields.io/nuget/vpre/Umbraco.Community.Merchello?color=0273B3)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/Umbraco.Community.Merchello)
[![GitHub license](https://img.shields.io/github/license/GITHUB_USERNAME/GITHUB_REPOSITORY?color=8AB803)](../LICENSE)

Merchello is an enterprise ecommerce solution for Umbraco CMS. It provides a modular, extensible platform for building online stores with features including product management, shopping carts, checkout flows, payment processing, shipping, and tax calculations.

## Installation

Add the package to an existing Umbraco website (v15+) from nuget:

`dotnet add package Umbraco.Community.Merchello`

After installation, access the Merchello backoffice section in Umbraco to configure your store settings, add products, and set up payment and shipping providers.
